Part.Data: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?> <instance childrenOrderedList="7;57;" SecFuntionKey="GAMHome" defaultSecFuntionKey="GAMHome"> <WPRoot childrenOrderedList="7;66;Main Table" Template="Empty"> <table name="TableMain" themeClass="TableMain" defaultThemeClass="TableMain" numberOfColumns="1" defaultNumberOfColumns_S="1" defaultNumberOfColumns_M="1" defaultNumberOfColumns_L="1" type="Responsive" defaultType="Responsive" childrenOrderedList="7;28;ErrorViewer-7;66;TableContent" /> <steps /> </WPRoot> </instance>
